targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, change_type, market_value_delta, weight_delta_pct FROM period_holding_changes ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, abs(COALESCE(market_value_delta,0)) DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, change_type, market_value_delta, weight_delta_pct FROM period_holding_changes ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, abs(COALESCE(market_value_delta,0)) DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, list_type, symbol FROM period_position_lists ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, list_type, symbol LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, list_type, symbol FROM period_position_lists ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, list_type, symbol LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, ex_date, pay_date, amount FROM period_dividend_events ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, ex_date DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_type, period_end_date, symbol, ex_date, pay_date, amount FROM period_dividend_events ORDER BY period_end_date DESC, ex_date DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local, window, contribution_pct, return_pct FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE symbol='_portfolio' ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC, CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local, window, contribution_pct, return_pct FROM daily_return_attribution WHERE symbol='_portfolio' ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC, CASE window WHEN '1m' THEN 1 WHEN '3m' THEN 2 WHEN '6m' THEN 3 WHEN '12m' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END LIMIT 5
